user.title: Estfeed
user.description: Connect to your e-Elering API key

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the Estfeed API

abort.already_configured: This API key is already configured

backfill_history.name: Backfill history
backfill_history.description: Re-fetch and re-publish a wider window of long-term statistics.

months.name: Months
months.description: How many months of history to refetch (1-84).

entry_id.name: Config entry
entry_id.description: Which Estfeed config entry to backfill.

set_cumulative_reset_at.name: Set cumulative reset_at
set_cumulative_reset_at.description: Move the cumulative-since-reset baseline to a specific timestamp (e.g. to restore a previous anchor).

reset_at.name: Reset at
reset_at.description: New anchor timestamp. The cumulative sensor will sum intervals from this moment forward.

entry_id.name: Config entry
entry_id.description: Which Estfeed config entry to update.
